description: Contact support form with client and server validation
acceptance_criteria: Submit empty form and verify required field errors appear with data-testid='field-error'.
Enter invalid email format and verify email validation error appears.
Enter valid data in all fields and submit form.
Verify success message appears with data-testid='submit-success'.
Verify form fields clear after successful submission.
Verify message length validation: error if message < 10 or > 500 characters.
Verify form is accessible to both authenticated and guest users.
